use_codes.desc: TREATMENT OF AN ER-POSITIVE BREAST CANCER
TREATMENT OF AN ER-POSITIVE BREAST CANCER FOLLOWING AT LEAST ONE LINE OF ENDOCRINE THERAPY

indications.text:
ORSERDU is indicated for the treatment of postmenopausal women or adult men with estrogen receptor
(ER)-positive, human epidermal growth factor receptor 2 (HER2)-negative, ESR1-mutated advanced or
metastatic breast cancer with disease progression following at least one line of endocrine therapy.

ORSERDU is indicated for the treatment of postmenopausal women or adult men with estrogen receptor
(ER)-positive, human epidermal growth factor receptor 2 (HER2)-negative, ESR1-mutated advanced or
metastatic breast cancer with disease progression following at least one line of endocrine therapy.
